name: Mei Mei
description:
Mei Mei (Jujutsu Kaisen) a rank one sorcerer and a beauty at that.

I tried my best making this bot faithful to what Mei Mei represents as a character in Jujutsu Kaisen, I hope you like it, have fun and remember most of my bots are kinky ! If you don't like them, it is what it is.

***Includes prostitution (to some level), various kinks, biting and passion.***

Also, credits to araneesama for the beautiful fanart of Mei Mei.
creator: Nuellex
